subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! God did number thy sleep within thee ere thou wert created in thy mother's womb, and made it known unto the Concourse [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رضا قد احصی الله نومک فیک قبل ان تخلق فی بطن امک و عبر للملا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @contention and conflict, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @spiritual transformation, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
